claim: Humans landed on the Moon in 1969.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: Mount Everest is the tallest mountain above sea level.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.
expected_behavior: Should classify as likely incorrect or misleading.

claim: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: The Eiffel Tower is located in Rome.
expected_behavior: Should classify as clearly false.

claim: Water boils at 100°C at standard atmospheric pressure.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: The Taj Mahal is located in Agra.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: Australia is both a country and a continent.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: The capital of Canada is Toronto.
expected_behavior: Should classify as likely incorrect with high confidence.

claim: RBI is giving ₹75,000 relief funds through a WhatsApp registration link.
expected_behavior: Should flag as scam or unsupported high-risk financial claim.

claim: Your bank account will be suspended unless you verify PAN details through this Telegram link.
expected_behavior: Should flag as scam or phishing-style manipulation.

claim: Forward this message to 15 people or your WhatsApp account will stop working.
expected_behavior: Should identify as chain-message misinformation or scam.

claim: Amazon is giving free iPhones to users celebrating its anniversary today.
expected_behavior: Should identify as scam or fake giveaway behavior.

claim: Click this link to claim your free LPG subsidy from the Indian government.
expected_behavior: Should treat as scam or unsupported government-link bait.

claim: OpenAI is giving lifetime ChatGPT Plus subscriptions for forwarding a message.
expected_behavior: Should identify as scam or fake giveaway behavior.

claim: Your Aadhaar card has been blocked due to suspicious activity; verify immediately here.
expected_behavior: Should treat as phishing-style scam or unsupported high-risk claim.

claim: Coca-Cola is offering ₹10,000 rewards for completing a survey today.
expected_behavior: Should identify as scam or fake giveaway behavior.

claim: Drinking hot water instantly kills all viruses in the throat.
expected_behavior: Should classify as dangerous unsupported health misinformation.

claim: WHO officially declared coffee a cure for cancer.
expected_behavior: Should classify as unsupported or incorrect with strong health caution.

claim: Vaccines contain tracking microchips.
expected_behavior: Should classify as unsupported dangerous misinformation.

claim: Walking daily reduces cardiovascular risk.
expected_behavior: Should classify as generally corroborated with moderate or high confidence.

claim: Eating garlic alone can cure severe bacterial infections.
expected_behavior: Should classify as dangerous unsupported health misinformation.

claim: The human body has exactly 206 bones in adulthood.
expected_behavior: Should classify as corroborated with high confidence.

claim: Dettol can safely be consumed in small amounts to prevent infection.
expected_behavior: Should classify as dangerous unsupported health misinformation.

claim: WHO recommends bleach consumption for immunity boosting.
expected_behavior: Should classify as dangerous unsupported health misinformation.

claim: Reuters confirmed alien life was discovered on Mars yesterday.
expected_behavior: Should require current authoritative evidence and avoid sensational confirmation.

claim: NASA announced the Moon is hollow during a live conference today.
expected_behavior: Should remain low confidence and avoid sensational certainty.

claim: BBC reported that India is banning all social media platforms next month.
expected_behavior: Should remain low confidence and avoid unsupported confirmation.

claim: A famous Bollywood actor died in a helicopter crash this morning.
expected_behavior: Should stay unverified or low confidence unless directly supported by authoritative current evidence.

claim: Apple announced permanent free iPhones for students worldwide.
expected_behavior: Should identify as likely false or unsupported without sensational certainty.

claim: The United Nations declared internet shutdowns illegal globally today.
expected_behavior: Should remain low confidence and avoid unsupported confirmation.

claim: Crime has doubled because incidents increased from 2 to 4 cases.
expected_behavior: Should classify as misleading or weak evidence from a trivial sample size.

claim: A study of 8 people proved chocolate increases intelligence permanently.
expected_behavior: Should classify as misleading or unsupported statistical overreach.

claim: 95% of doctors recommend this herbal drink for diabetes reversal.
expected_behavior: Should classify as unsupported or suspiciously framed statistic.

claim: India has the highest GDP in the world.
expected_behavior: Should classify as likely incorrect or misleading with comparison context.

claim: 100% of people who drank water eventually died.
expected_behavior: Should classify as misleading and logically manipulative.

claim: A graph showing rising temperatures proves all climate models are fake.
expected_behavior: Should classify as misleading and logically unsound.

claim: Albert Einstein said “Success is 1% talent and 99% persistence.”
expected_behavior: Should classify as false attribution or unsupported quote.

claim: Warren Buffett said Bitcoin will replace all currencies by 2030.
expected_behavior: Should classify as false attribution or unsupported quote.

claim: WHO Director-General said vaccines are unnecessary for children.
expected_behavior: Should classify as false attribution or unsupported quote.

claim: Elon Musk confirmed humans will live on Mars permanently by 2027.
expected_behavior: Should classify as unsupported quote or speculative statement.

claim: Wikipedia cannot be trusted because anyone can edit it.
expected_behavior: Should avoid overgeneralization and provide a nuanced response.

claim: AI-generated images are always fake and should never be trusted.
expected_behavior: Should avoid absolutist framing and provide a nuanced response.

claim: News channels intentionally spread misinformation for profit.
expected_behavior: Should avoid accepting the claim without evidence and remain cautious.

claim: Social media algorithms amplify emotionally charged misinformation.
expected_behavior: Should classify cautiously, likely as broadly supported but nuanced.

claim: Deepfake detection tools are 100% accurate.
expected_behavior: Should classify as likely false or misleading due to absolutist wording.

claim: A screenshot alone is enough proof that an event happened.
expected_behavior: Should classify as misleading and caution that screenshots are weak evidence.

claim: Satirical articles are often mistaken for real news online.
expected_behavior: Should classify as broadly supported but context-dependent.

claim: Viral information spreads faster than verified corrections online.
expected_behavior: Should classify as broadly supported but nuanced.
